data.title: Impersonation scams surge by 1400% in 2025 - experts advise vigilance against unsolicited messages to prevent deception.
data.description: According to crypto security experts, a key tactic to combat scams that depend on deceiving individuals is to approach all unsolicited messages and interactions with skepticism.

data.title: Saks Global secures $1.75B, former Neiman Marcus CEO returns, commences chapter 11 process with key support. Stores and ecommerce open.
data.description: Various retail stores and online shopping platforms under the names of Saks Fifth Avenue, Neiman Marcus, Bergdorf Goodman, Saks OFF 5TH, Last Call, and Horchow are currently operational and catering to customers. The company has initiated a voluntary chapter 11 process with backing from important financial partners. The former CEO of Neiman Marcus Group is also involved in the proceedings.
SAKS GLOBAL FILES FOR CH. 11 BANKRUPTCY IN TEXAS

data.title: Advocates push US lawmakers for stablecoin tax rules, urging for extension of relief beyond current approach for better payments.
data.description: Advocacy groups are pushing Congress to extend crypto tax relief to include all cryptocurrencies, not just stablecoins. They argue that the current strategy will not streamline everyday transactions. The appeal comes as the IRS plans to track crypto transactions of $10,000 or more. This move has raised concerns among crypto enthusiasts and investors about potential tax implications. The groups are calling for a more comprehensive approach to crypto taxation to ensure clarity and flexibility in digital asset payments.

TD Cowen raises Boeing target to $260 from $240.

data.title: Stablecoins offering yield could lead to a 'dangerous' parallel banking system, warns JPMorgan executive to shareholders.
data.description: Jeremy Barnum warned JPMorgan shareholders about the potential risks associated with yield-bearing stablecoins, stating that they could lead to the development of a parallel banking system lacking the regulatory protections of traditional financial institutions.
